preferred_mix.goal: Own durable search intents tied to bankroll, replay, and hand-history workflows.
Support near-page-one queries and reduce ambiguity around free vs premium workflows.
Capture realistic live-poker situations using player language and product-relevant advice.
Publish timely commentary only when the topic materially affects live poker players or connects naturally to the product.

quality_gates: useful body content, not a thin wrapper
internal links to bankroll or hand-review when relevant
no generic news rewrites without analysis
disallowed_patterns: daily forced publishing regardless of topic quality
pages that do not support a real player task
content whose only purpose is to create more URLs
